Tips for More Sales

📸Use bright, clear photos with a plain background. Multiple angles sell faster.
✍️Write descriptions that answer common questions — size, material, colour.
🏷️Price competitively. Check similar products on Jumia or Jiji first.
📦Keep your stock quantity updated to avoid failed orders.
💬Add your WhatsApp link so buyers can reach you directly.
🎉

Product Published!

Your product is now live on ProGuides Store. Share it with your customers to start getting orders!
